message:
test(proptest): add 20 property tests for crash coverage gaps

Add CR-40 through CR-59 covering FileRedactionEntry serde,
CrashLoopDetector crashes_in_window (direct + window exclusion),
total_restarts, last_crash_timestamp, diagnostics consistency,
CaptureCheckpoint save/load roundtrip + version rejection,
HealthSnapshot global store/retrieve, CrashConfig Debug, PaneCaptureState
equality, CrashLoopConfig defaults, CrashLoopDetector serde, DbMetadata
serde (None and populated), IncidentKind/ReplayMode Display, and
ShutdownSummary serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
